notes: Services in this file are end-to-end usable today: probe-catalog parsed_ok with a Solana-USDC leg (or, in textbelt-sms's case, a verified separately-captured POST send endpoint that the catalog probe didn't reach) AND the response shape is deliverable to Telegram/Discord (text/JSON, not binary). Of the 72 upstream pay.sh services: 10 are listed here (supported); 62 are in unsupported.json across four buckets — (a) 1 requires_binary_response (paysponge/fal — `evidence_basis: product-family-inference`, the endpoint names map to fal-ai's published image/video-gen models like Flux, SDXL, Stable Video, Minimax-video; we have not settled to observe a paid response); (b) 1 unverified_paid_response_shape (paysponge/screenshotone — its openapi DECLARES application/json which contradicts the screenshot-as-a-service product-family inference, so we conservatively hold it out until BAT-708 captures a paid response; previously classified as requires_binary_response, retracted in PR #378 R10); (c) 40 parser-reject (33 mpp_protocol + 5 siwx_auth_required + 2 invalid_demand — textbelt was previously in this bucket but its paid POST endpoint is now in catalog.json as textbelt-sms); (d) 20 endpoint_not_402_at_probe (broken/moved at probe time; was 21 before fal was reclassified). Several unsupported entries also carry BAT-706 audit notes for SIBLING endpoints on the same host that ARE payable but aren't catalogued yet — notably paysponge/perplexity (3 paid endpoints: /search, /v1/agent, /v1/async/sonar) and paysponge/nyne (2 paid endpoints: /person/enrichment, /person/search, both PII-sensitive). Deferred to BAT-708 for per-endpoint catalogging + safety scoping. See SKILL.md for the read flow, tests/paysh/catalog-summary.md for the standard probe matrix, and tests/paysh/catalog-audit.md for the BAT-706 multi-endpoint audit.

services.name: Wolfram Alpha
services.summary: Computational intelligence — math, science, factual lookups via the Wolfram knowledge engine.

services.name: Tripadvisor Nearby Search
services.summary: Search nearby travel locations — hotels, restaurants, attractions — by latitude/longitude.

services.name: 2Captcha
intents: solve captcha on my own site
accessibility captcha helper for users with disabilities
captcha during testing of a site I own or have operator permission to automate
services.summary: Submit a CAPTCHA for solving — supports recaptcha, hcaptcha, image. Authorized use only: (1) accessibility assistance for users with disabilities completing a CAPTCHA on a site they're legitimately using, or (2) automated testing of a site the user OWNS or has direct site-operator permission to automate. The user's own consent does NOT make solving a CAPTCHA on a third-party site authorized — the SITE OPERATOR's consent is what matters. NOT for defeating anti-abuse controls.

services.name: Reducto Document Parser
services.summary: Parse documents (PDF, images) into structured data via Reducto's AI extraction.

services.name: Rentcast Markets
services.summary: US rental market data — average rent, market trends, property statistics by zip/city.

services.name: Crushrewards Shopper
services.summary: Find best price across major US retailers (Amazon, Walmart, Costco, Home Depot, etc.).

services.name: StableCrypto New Pools
services.summary: Get new on-chain pools across DEXes via the CoinGecko-onchain proxy. Returns recently-deployed token pairs — NOT generic price lookups.

services.name: StableEnrich Data Enrichment
services.summary: Enrich emails, domains, or names into person/company profiles (LinkedIn-style data).

services.name: Purch Marketplace Search
services.summary: Search the Purch marketplace catalog (general product/listing search).

services.name: Textbelt SMS
services.summary: Send a real SMS to a phone number (E.164 format). Authorized-use only: the user's own phone, or a recipient who has clearly consented. NOT for bulk, marketing-without-opt-in, phishing, or impersonation. POST always confirms before paying.
